Test Description: Configures GPIO[8..39] as inputs with negative-edge interrupt enable; drives pads to generate falling edges per bit; waits for ISR; ISR validates per-pin DIN=0, raw interrupt set, clears raw and group status, clears sysreg and GIC, and verifies clears.
Remarks: Uses volatile int_pend as ISR handshake; writes to external pad driver at 0xA0243ffc to create edges; bounded timeout waits in polling loop.
Test Steps / Procedure: Entry: test_case(); 1) Initialize: test_err=0; Optionally enable GIC IRQ 87 or 88 depending on GPIO0/GPIO1 macros. 2) WRITE: enable sysreg interrupt via write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO{0|1}_INTR). 3) WRITE: set external pad driver 0xA0243ffc=0xFFFFFFFF (all high, known state). 4) Phase1 loop i=0..31: addr1=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i*4); WRITE: (1<<20)|(1<<18)|(1<<16) to set doe=1 (input), neie=1, iclr=1; wait_on(10). 5) Phase2 loop i=0..31: wr_val=1<<i; WRITE: MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1=wr_val (pre-clear); WRITE: MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1=wr_val (enable only this bit); wait_on(10); SET int_pend=1 (arm wait before edge). 6) Edge gen: WRITE 0xA0243ffc=0xFFFFFFFF; wait_on(30); WRITE 0xA0243ffc=~wr_val (only target bit low -> falling edge). 7) Poll with timeout: while(int_pend && timeout--) wait_on(10); if timeout==0 -> printf timeout and test_err++. 8) End of test: finish(test_err). ISR: Default_IRQHandler() 9) On entry: local_wr=1<<i; WRITE 0xA0243ffc=0xFFFFFFFF (return pads to high). 10) READ raddr=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8 + (i*4); rdata=read_reg(raddr). 11) VALIDATE DIN: if ((rdata & 0x1) != 0) test_err++. 12) if ((rdata & 0x2) != 0x0) then: READ rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if ((rdata_grp & local_wr)==0) test_err++; 13) CLEAR per-pin raw: WRITE raddr2=(same pin); value=(1<<20)|(1<<16) (doe=1, iclr=1). 14) CLEAR group raw: WRITE MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1=local_wr. 15) VERIFY group clear: READ rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if (rdata_grp != 0x0) test_err++. 16) CLEAR sysreg + GIC: if GPIO0 then WRITE MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1=LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR; GIC_ClearIRQ(87); if GPIO1 then WRITE MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1=LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR; GIC_ClearIRQ(88). 17) else-path: if ((rdata & 0x2) == 0) test_err++ (unexpected for negedge).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: - Timeout wait: PASS if ISR clears int_pend before timeout (loop exits with timeout>0); FAIL if timeout==0 prints ERROR: Timeout..." and increments test_err. - ISR DIN check: PASS if (rdata & 0x1)==0 after negedge; else increments test_err. - ISR raw bit check: PASS if ((rdata & 0x2)!=0x0) and group status read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) has local_wr bit set; else increments test_err. - Group clear verification: PASS if read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1)==0x0 after writes to per-pin iclr and RAW_STCLR1; else increments test_err. - Sysreg raw clear check: PASS implied by no error prints in handler branches; explicit checks not present for negedge case beyond writes; overall PASS when finish(test_err) called with test_err==0."
